security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob: data:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob: data:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:1421 http://localhost:1420

bundle.longDescription: Conclave MD is a local-first clinical decision-support tool that runs a virtual multidisciplinary board over your own protocols. It does not replace clinical judgement.
